## Checklist

- [ ] Branch named `feat/<NN>-<slug>`
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] CI green (lint, format, type-check, tests)
- [ ] Eval gate run if this PR touched `app/rag/` or `app/guardrails/` (RAG = manual dispatch; red-team = auto on PR)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or tokens committed
- [ ] Any `P-XXX` this phase resolves has been graduated to a `D-XXX` with a number
- [ ] Phase ticked off in `Checklist.md` and `CLAUDE.md §2` status updated (if last commit of the phase)
